name: jask-search-entities

outputs.description: When the entity was first seen Jask.Entity.LastSeen When the entity was last seen
outputs.name: Jask.Entity.FirstSeen

outputs.description: The source of the entity Jask.Entity.EntityType Entity type
outputs.name: Jask.Entity.Source

outputs.description: The primary entity type Jask.Entity.HostName Entity hostname
outputs.name: Jask.Entity.PrimaryEntityType

outputs.description: Entity risk score Jask.Entity.IsWhiteListed Whether or not the entity is on allow list
outputs.name: Jask.Entity.RiskScore

outputs.description: The groups of the entity Jask.Entity.Ip.Address Entity IP address
outputs.name: Jask.Entity.Groups
